name: Dill Bread KH
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve yeast in 1/2 cup of warm water with 1/2 teaspoon sugar.
2. Heat the cottage cheese to lukewarm.
3. In a large bowl, combine the remaining sugar, salt, baking soda, chopped dill, and eggs.
4. Gradually add the cottage cheese and stir in the cheese until well combined.
5. Add the flour gradually, mixing 1 cup at a time until a thick batter forms.
6. Pour the batter into a greased bowl and let it rise to double its size.
7. Gently fold the dough to incorporate air, then transfer it to 4 greased loaf pans.
8. Let the loaves rise again.
9. Preheat oven to desired temperature.
10. Bake for 30 minutes.
11. Brush the tops of the bread with butter and bake an additional 10 minutes.
Butter is optional and can be brushed on top before baking for added flavor.
